creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
Created attachment 187855
kldload virtio_console

Hi,

I have just installed FreeBSD from this snapshot on oVirt 3.5 VM:
FreeBSD-12.0-CURRENT-amd64-20171030-r325156-disc1.iso

Install went fine, FreeBSD booted and I logged in using SSH.

Then I typed command 'kldload virtio_console' and system panicked instantly.

The attachment shows panic on console.

Regards,
vermaden
